reviews.comment:

The cleanliness of the restrooms is much appreciated!

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención del personal. Los baños muy limpios. Lamentablemente no cuenta con shop y los surtidores se notan antiguos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. The restrooms were very clean. Unfortunately, there's no convenience store and the pumps look old.

reviews.comment:
Me imagino que cumple su función.
Es la única que hay en la zona (al menos en 100kms o 150kms a la redonda).
Justo cuando fuimos a Cachi no tenían nafta. Ligamos porque habíamos ido con tanque lleno 😃

(Translated by Google)
I imagine it does its job.
It's the only one in the area (at least within a 100 or 150 km radius).
Just when we went to Cachi, they were out of gas. We were lucky because we'd gone with a full tank 😃
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobElpajFBRRAB
